calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Off Calendar

Amended Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph Carson, Clerk: S.Vantree CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

John Douglas Moore., appearing for Plaintiff CTI II, LLC dba Corporate Tax Incentives
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) The Document Company Inc.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witness Tammara Brown sworn and testifies.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff CTI II, LLC dba Corporate Tax Incentives, and against Defaulted Defendant(s)The Document Company as follows:

Damages: $49,317.72
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,226.49
Attorney's Fees: $6,480.00
Costs: $531.80
Total Judgment in the amount of $57,556.21

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
